metadata.title: Generate a MirrorOS analysis prompt that can be memory-engraved for a nontechnical business owner in Africa, using the runtime_lens to handle language-mixed, chaotic input with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a MirrorOS analysis prompt that can be memory-engraved for a nontechnical business owner in Africa, using the runtime_lens to handle language-mixed, chaotic input with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria.
mission.success_definition: The generated prompt can be directly used for memory engraving in MirrorOS.; All validation gates are explicitly defined and testable.; The output contract is unambiguous and actionable.; The artifact handles chaotic input without loss of governance.

in_scope.item: The prompt must produce a structured analysis artifact that includes explicit validation gates, SR8-compilable sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract), and be suitable for Codex runtime execution.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The generated prompt can be directly used for memory engraving in MirrorOS.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All validation gates are explicitly defined and testable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: The output contract is unambiguous and actionable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: The artifact handles chaotic input without loss of governance.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.analysis_subject: Generate a MirrorOS analysis prompt that can be memory-engraved for a nontechnical business owner in Africa, using the runtime_lens to handle language-mixed, chaotic input with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria.

mirrors.item: The prompt must produce a structured analysis artifact that includes explicit validation gates, SR8-compilable sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract), and be suitable for Codex runtime execution.

contradiction_checks.item: Input is language-mixed and may contain incomplete or contradictory information.
Output must be governed and auditable, with clear validation checkpoints.
Must not assume technical expertise from the business owner.
Must respect regional and cultural context of Africa.
All sections must be SRXML-compliant for SR8 compilation.

SRXML_Artifact.synthesis_contract: format: SRXML; sections: Objective; Scope; Constraints; Success Criteria; Output Contract; validation_gates: Gate 1: Input sanitization and language normalization.; Gate 2: Context reconstruction from partial data.; Gate 3: Constraint extraction and conflict resolution.; Gate 4: Acceptance criteria disambiguation.; Gate 5: Final compliance check against SR8 schema.; runtime: Codex; target_audience: Nontechnical business owner in Africa

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
